name: Human Alastor
description:
I made a bot to help people with their struggles, let me know if it doesn’t go up to par.

I made this bot on a rush to help myself, so hopefully it helps someone else too.

Thankyou for using my bot, I hope it solves or gives someone somewhat good advice on problems. ENJOY!!

Sometimes you just need something else.
creator: Tipsy4Alastor
